propositions: A completion PASS persists only signed counts and leaves no durable per-criterion audit record, unlike plan and code reviews.
The verifier emits findings only for failing criteria, so a passing ticket has no positive per-criterion result list.
Add a positive per-criterion criteria[] array (criterion, met, citation, kind) to the verifier output alongside the failures-only findings.
Emit a completion sidecar on PASS under a new completion_verifier_pass_v1 schema while leaving the existing completion_verifier_fail_v1 schema untouched.
reconcile_verdict must not flip a PASS carrying a populated criteria[] and empty findings to FAIL, and must not strip the criteria array.
criteria[] is optional and backward-compatible so an older agent omitting it yields today's PASS-counts-only behavior.
